Class QueryInputProcessKeyEventArgs

Provides data for the QueryProcessKey event.

Properties

IsNeededKey

specify whether the KeyData is processed by the editor or a container control.

Declaration
public bool IsNeededKey { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

true if the KeyData is processed by editor; false if KeyData is processed by container control.

KeyData

Gets the key data that need to be processed.

Property Value

Keys

A Keys enumeration value that contains the key data to process.
